name: SLAPBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Large Language Models for Four-Finger SLAP Fingerprint Verification
summary: arXiv:2607.15517v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Four-finger SLAP fingerprints are flat live-scan impressions of the index, middle, ring, and little fingers of one hand, used for identity verifica...
description: arXiv:2607.15517v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Four-finger SLAP fingerprints are flat live-scan impressions of the index, middle, ring, and little fingers of one hand, used for identity verification in border control and law enforcement. No benchmark has evaluated whether multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can verify identity from SLAP images. We introduce SLAPBench, the first benchmar...
author: Bibesh Pyakurel, M. G. Sarwar Murshed
